entity.label: Jaazaniah
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: The son of Jeremiah, and one of the chief Rechabites (Jer. 35:3).

nodes.label: Jaazaniah
nodes.description: The son of Jeremiah, and one of the chief Rechabites (Jer. 35:3).

verses.text: Then I took Jaazaniah the son of Jeremiah, the son of Habaziniah, and his brethren, and all his sons, and the whole house of the Rechabites;
